meaning: adj.苛求的,严格的,吃力的,需付出极大耐心
examples: He was an exacting man to work for.
She didn't think that he was well enough to carry out such an exacting task.
That challenge has proved to be singularly exacting and complex.
Progressive taxation deters our best producers and exacting double taxation against investment income drives capital away.
In other words companies like Huddle are scaling up to delivery demands that are exacting.
